name: IdsDmProdBnfSumDel

text.value: WITH xfm_Businesslogic AS (SELECT @{pipeline().parameters.RunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_NO) DELETE FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ClmMartOwner}.PROD_DM_BNF_SUM_DTL WHERE LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_NO <> (SELECT LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_NO FROM xfm_Businesslogic)

Description:

JOB NAME:     WebDMLastUpd

DESCRIPTION:     Each delete statement looks for run cycle is older than the current run cycle.  These rows were not update with the current process so they don't exist in the source system anymore.
